title: How HP’s new IQ on-device assistant reimagines the AI interface on PCs
description: HP is using artificial intelligence to revive the PC market with their new AI companion, HP IQ. This interface is targeted at enterprise and business computers and allows users to ask questions, summarize documents, and optimize PC settings. It also has a feature for easy file sharing and conferencing. This approach mirrors Apple’s strategy.
